_comment: Central taxonomy + reason map for the entity guard. This is LOGIC, not a name dump: 'reasons' pins the canonical rejection reason per entity type; 'role_cues' groups the linguistic titles that identify each non-player football role so a subject can be classified from context (no per-name lists). 'always_reject' is a tiny set of explicit protected names that must never be a transfer subject regardless of context — kept minimal on purpose.

always_reject.note: Deliberately empty of inline names — journalists/companies/sponsors/media/stadiums are carried in their own files so this stays logic-first.
